headline: Cognizant (CTSH) Integrates ServiceNow (NOW) AI Agents With Neuro AI Multi-Agent Accelerator
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (NASDAQ:CTSH) is one of the most promising stocks with highest upside potential. On June 18, Cognizant announced that ServiceNow (NOW) AI Agents are now interoperable with the Cognizant Neuro AI Multi-Agent Accelerator, enabling enterprises to unify and orchestrate AI agents across disparate platforms. This integration allows ServiceNow’s specialized agents to function […]

headline: CTSH Grows Through Strong Partnerships: Buy, Sell or Hold the Stock?
summary: Cognizant deepens AI partnerships and sees strong bookings growth, but macro uncertainty and soft demand cloud its near-term outlook.

headline: Pzena Focused Value Strategy Added Cognizant Technology Solutions Corporation (CTSH) Ignoring Overblown AI Risk
summary: Pzena Investment Management recently released its first-quarter 2026 commentary for “Pzena Focused Value Strategy.” A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. headline: Cognizant Tech Solutions-A (NASDAQ:CTSH) Offers a Strong Dividend Yield of 3.02% with Sustainable Fundamentals
summary: Cognizant Tech Solutions (CTSH) scores high on ChartMill's Best Dividend Stocks screener with a 3.02% yield, low 27.55% payout ratio, strong profitability, and excellent financial health, making it a sustainable dividend pick.
